title: Uthralikavu Pooram
tagline: Uthralikavu Pooram — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Uthralikkavu Pooram (ഉത്രാളിക്കാവ്) is a festival held at Shri Rudhiramahakalikav (ശ്രീ രുധിരമഹാകാളികാവ്) temple situated at Wadakkanchery in Thalappilly taluk of Thrissur district
overview.description: Uthralikkavu Pooram (ഉത്രാളിക്കാവ്) is a festival held at Shri Rudhiramahakalikav (ശ്രീ രുധിരമഹാകാളികാവ്) temple situated at Wadakkanchery in Thalappilly taluk of Thrissur district in Kerala, South India. The temple is famed for its Pooram festival held during February / March every year.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Veeranimangalam Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Veeranimangalam Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva and Lord Narasimha is situated at Enkakkad of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The Lord Shiva of the temple is the Shiva Lingam facing west.

topPlaces.name: Puducode
topPlaces.description: Puthucode (also spelled Puducode and Puthukkode) is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated in Alathur taluk, around 12 km from Alathur and 4 km from Vadakkancherry, on the western bank of Mangalam River, a sub-tributary of Bharathapuzha.

topPlaces.name: Wadakkancherry, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Wadakkancherry (IPA: [ʋɐɖɐkːaːɲdʒeːɾi]) is a major town in Thrissur, Kerala. Up until 1860, this area was part of Chelakkara Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Karumathara
topPlaces.description: Karumathara is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Enkakkad
topPlaces.description: Enkakkad is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a small village with beautiful nature.

topPlaces.name: Mullurkara
topPlaces.description: Mullurkara is a village in Thalapilly Taluk of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The Malayalam film actress Philomina was born here.

topPlaces.name: Asurankundu Dam
topPlaces.description: Asurankund Dam is a check dam located on the Chelakkara River in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located in Mullurkara Panchayat in Thrissur district.

topPlaces.name: Pallimanna Siva Temple
topPlaces.description: Pallimanna Siva Temple is a temple located at Kumbalangad, a small village in Thrissur District, Kerala, India. The temple is located at Kumbalangad - Kanjirakode Road, Vadakkancherry.

items.note: Veeranimangalam Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva and Lord Narasimha is situated at Enkakkad of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The Lord Shiva of the temple is the Shiva Lingam facing west.

Puthucode (also spelled Puducode and Puthukkode) is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated in Alathur taluk, around 12 km from Alathur and 4 km from Vadakkancherry, on the western bank of Mangalam River, a sub-tributary of Bharathapuzha.
Wadakkancherry (IPA: [ʋɐɖɐkːaːɲdʒeːɾi]) is a major town in Thrissur, Kerala. Up until 1860, this area was part of Chelakkara Taluk.
Karumathara is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.
Enkakkad is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a small village with beautiful nature.
Mullurkara is a village in Thalapilly Taluk of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The Malayalam film actress Philomina was born here.
Asurankund Dam is a check dam located on the Chelakkara River in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located in Mullurkara Panchayat in Thrissur district.
Pallimanna Siva Temple is a temple located at Kumbalangad, a small village in Thrissur District, Kerala, India. The temple is located at Kumbalangad - Kanjirakode Road, Vadakkancherry.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Uthralikavu Pooram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Uthralikavu Pooram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Uthralikavu Pooram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Uthralikavu Pooram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Uthralikavu Pooram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Uthralikavu Pooram?
faq.a: Stays in Uthralikavu Pooram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Uthralikavu Pooram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Veeranimangalam Mahadeva Temple, Puducode, Wadakkancherry, Thrissur, Karumathara, Enkakkad.
